description: SDXL-Turbo (Stability AI) — real-time synthesis in 1–4 steps via ADD distillation
_comment: SDXL-Turbo is distilled via Adversarial Diffusion Distillation (ADD). Produces photorealistic results in as few as 1 step; 4 steps give best quality.
_comment_guidance: CRITICAL: guidance_scale MUST be 0.0 — ADD distillation has CFG baked in. Any positive value degrades quality severely.
_comment_negative: Negative prompts have NO effect with guidance_scale=0.0 and should be omitted.
_comment_steps: 1 step is enough for rough drafts. 4 steps gives the best quality/speed trade-off per the model card evaluation.
_comment_size: Native resolution is 512x512 per model card. 768x768 works but may introduce minor artifacts.
_comment_offload: Enable on ≤16 GB unified memory (MPS) to avoid OOM — roughly halves peak VRAM at cost of speed.
_comment_license: sai-nc-community license — non-commercial use only. Commercial use requires https://stability.ai/membership.
